extension.summary: No scrolling. No deciding. Just watching.
extension.description: Tired of scrolling through your library wondering what to watch? EasyTV handles it. It tracks your shows and always knows your next episode. When you're ready for something new, it'll suggest a show you haven't started. Throw in some movies if you want. Just sit down, press play, and enjoy. Built for Kodi 21+.
extension.news: v1.5.5 (2026-06-25) - Multi-instance sync now keeps every device in step: finishing or pausing an episode on one device updates the next episode and resume point on the others - Opening EasyTV now syncs immediately, so changes made on another device show up right away instead of after a delay - Faster browse on large libraries when another device has made changes - Fewer unnecessary smart playlist rewrites
